release_notes: Updater fix: swap-on-launch logic moved into marosa_magic.py so updates apply correctly when launching python directly (not just via run.cmd). Plus the 4.0.9.2 File Comparison redesign carried over: lines_<sheet> tab per common sheet always emitted, per-row MATCH/DIFF/ONLY markers, PER-SHEET ROW IDENTITY block, expanded Sheet_Map columns. 314 tests + 4 skipped.
